overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through a futuristic urban highway from a covered underpass into bright sunlight. The vehicle navigates dense traffic surrounded by towering megastructures, elevated transit lines, and neon signage in a vivid cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway underpass with directional signage

events.description: exiting the underpass, transitioning from artificial overhead lighting to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic in a covered highway lane, maintaining steady speed while approaching the underpass exit

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining consistent speed
dark SUV driving in the adjacent left lane, occasionally changing position

entered.detail: illuminated green highway directional signs with arrows and text mounted on the overpass ceiling
smooth grey concrete wall lining the right side of the highway under the overpass
red neon sign with text 'V's SAFE' mounted on the left wall of the underpass
concrete and metal overpass structure creating a covered roadway with artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered urban highway underpass with artificial lighting and directional signage overhead. The concrete retaining wall runs along the right side while moderate traffic flows ahead, and a red neon sign is visible on the left wall before approaching the bright exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated urban highway with megastructures and elevated transit infrastructure

events.description: vehicle accelerates slightly as traffic spacing opens up on the highway
passing alongside a massive megatower with exposed construction scaffolding and green netting on the right facade

agents.ego_description: cruising at highway speed in bright sunlight, overtaking slower vehicles and navigating through lanes of traffic

notable_agents.action: green sports car being overtaken in the left lane
silver sedan driving ahead, maintaining distance

entered.detail: futuristic elevated monorail or highway structure with support pillars running parallel on the left side
massive futuristic skyscraper with glass and steel facade towering over the highway
tall building with exposed scaffolding, construction netting, and industrial framework on the right side
futuristic street lamps with horizontal orange light bars lining the left side of the highway

changed.detail: the concrete wall recedes into the distance as the megatower construction comes into view on the right

segments.scene_description: Driving on an open elevated highway in bright midday sunlight, having exited the underpass. The scene features a futuristic elevated transit line on the left and massive megatowers on the right, including one with exposed construction scaffolding. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic while futuristic street lamps line the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a dim, enclosed urban underpass into the blinding glare of a sunlit futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath a covered highway, moving past artificial overhead lighting and a red neon sign on the left wall while following a concrete retaining wall. As the vehicle approaches the exit, the artificial shadows give way to bright midday sunlight, causing the environment to open up into a vast elevated highway. The scene then expands to reveal a towering cityscape, with a futuristic transit line appearing on the left and massive megatowers with construction scaffolding rising on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward through moderate traffic, guided by a line of futuristic street lamps under a clear, bright sky.
